name: Style Guide Writer
description: Build practical writing style guides that turn brand voice, editorial standards, UX copy rules, and terminology decisions into usable instructions, examples, and review logic for real teams.
not_for: high-level brand strategy without language rules
legal drafting standards as the main task
typical_inputs: examples of on-brand and off-brand content
audience segments, channels, and risk-sensitive moments
required terms, prohibited claims, and compliance constraints
writer workflow, reviewer workflow, and current inconsistency patterns
typical_outputs: full style guide or condensed working guide
voice and tone framework with flex rules by context
microcopy standards for UI states and lifecycle moments
